description_long: This is a large, circular stone fountain set within a paved plaza, featuring a central pedestal supporting a classical-style human statue. The statue stands atop a raised basin, which is itself surrounded by a low, circular wall that forms the main water reservoir. The fountain is encircled by three curved stone benches, integrated into the outer perimeter, providing seating and a sense of enclosure. The paving within the fountain area is composed of concentric stone tiles, radiating outward from the statue. The stonework appears weathered and mossy, suggesting an outdoor park or garden setting. The overall design is both ornamental and functional, serving as a focal point for public gathering.
description: A large, circular stone fountain with a central human statue, surrounded by curved benches and concentric stone paving. The structure is ornate and serves as a public gathering spot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the statue, central basin, and the three curved benches with the stone paving clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the right side of the fountain, with the statue and benches still prominent.
description_view_2: Rear angled view focusing on the back of the statue and the symmetry of the benches and paving.
description_view_3: Left-side view showing the statue from behind and the arrangement of the benches and paving.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain features a classical human statue as its centerpiece, with detailed sculpting and a traditional pose. The basin and benches are adorned with rough-hewn stonework, and the paving is arranged in decorative concentric circles.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is circular, raised on a pedestal, and surrounded by a low stone wall. It appears to be a single-tiered structure with a simple, robust rim.
attribute_surrounding_landscaping: Three curved stone benches are integrated into the outer edge of the fountain, and the ground is paved with concentric stone tiles. No visible plants or additional landscaping elements are present.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible water jets or spray patterns are present in the fountain structure.
